title: Lotodes multijugum
taxonomy: Lotodes multijugum is a species of plant in the family Haloragaceae. It is native to Australia and New Zealand. The classification of Lotodes multijugum is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Haloragales, family Haloragaceae, genus Lotodes, and species L. multijugum. The family Haloragaceae is a small family of flowering plants commonly known as the water-dillies or the water- daisies. These plants are known for their aquatic and semi-aquatic habits.
